collection_method.description: Reviews were programmatically collected using the google-play-scraper Python library, retrieving the most recent reviews.

cleaning_decisions.deduplication: Duplicate reviews removed based on identical cleaned content.
cleaning_decisions.empty_entries: Reviews with missing or empty content were removed.
cleaning_decisions.short_reviews: Reviews with fewer than 4 words after cleaning were removed.
cleaning_decisions.punctuation_removal: All punctuation and non-alphabetic characters removed using regex.
cleaning_decisions.emoji_and_special_character_removal: All emojis and special characters removed.
cleaning_decisions.number_conversion: Digits converted to their word equivalents (e.g., 5 → five).
cleaning_decisions.whitespace_normalization: Extra whitespace collapsed into single spaces.
cleaning_decisions.stop_word_removal: Common stop words removed using a predefined list.
cleaning_decisions.contraction_handling: Common contractions expanded before processing (e.g., 'don't' → 'do not').
